subScenes.name: 开场问候
subScenes.description: 答辩委员会成员致意并确认身份

qaPairs.speakerText: Good morning, can you confirm your name and thesis title?
qaPairs.speakerTextCn: 早上好，请确认一下你的名字和论文题目？

responses.text: Good morning, Professor Smith. I'm Li Wei, and my thesis is 'AI in Higher Education'.
responses.text_cn: 早上好，史密斯教授。我是李伟，我的论文是《人工智能在高等教育中的应用》。

responses.text: Yeah, I'm Li Wei. My paper's about AI in ed-tech.
responses.text_cn: 我是李伟，论文讲的是教育科技里的AI。

responses.text: Li Wei. Thesis: AI in Higher Ed.
responses.text_cn: 李伟，论文：人工智能在高等教育。

qaPairs.usageNote: 正式回应需完整姓名与标题，避免口语省略

qaPairs.speakerText: Thanks for coming in today. Ready to get started?
qaPairs.speakerTextCn: 谢谢今天到场，准备好了吗？

responses.text: Yes, I'm fully prepared and excited to present my research.
responses.text_cn: 是的，我已充分准备，很期待展示我的研究。

responses.text: Absolutely, I've been waiting for this!
responses.text_cn: 当然！我等这一刻很久了！

responses.text: Ready.
responses.text_cn: 准备好了。

qaPairs.usageNote: 用简短回应显自信，但避免过度随意

subScenes.name: 核心论点追问
subScenes.description: 教授针对研究核心主张提问

qaPairs.speakerText: You claim AI improves student engagement, but your sample's only from one university. How do you justify generalizing?
qaPairs.speakerTextCn: 你声称AI能提升学生参与度，但样本只来自一所大学，如何支持普遍性？

responses.text: I acknowledge the limitation, but the institutional context is representative of mid-tier public universities in China, which cover 60% of the student population.
responses.text_cn: 我承认这一局限，但样本代表了中国60%学生所在的中等公立大学。

responses.text: Yeah, it's a small sample, but the trends were super clear.
responses.text_cn: 样本是小了点，但趋势特别明显。

responses.text: Sample size is limited; generalization requires future validation.
responses.text_cn: 样本有限，推广需后续验证。

qaPairs.usageNote: ��认局限+数据支撑，避免回避或夸大

qaPairs.speakerText: Why did you choose qualitative interviews over surveys?
qaPairs.speakerTextCn: 你为何选择质性访谈而非问卷调查？

responses.text: Surveys couldn't capture the nuanced emotional responses students had to AI tools; interviews revealed deeper motivations.
responses.text_cn: 问卷无法捕捉学生对AI工具的情感反应，访谈揭示了深层动机。

responses.text: Surveys felt too shallow—I wanted to hear their real stories.
responses.text_cn: 问卷太表面了，我想听他们的真实故事。

responses.text: Qualitative method better suited the exploratory goal.
responses.text_cn: 质性方法更契合探索性目标。

qaPairs.usageNote: 用研究目标解释方法选择，避免主观理由

subScenes.name: 方法论质疑
subScenes.description: 教授对数据收集或分析过程提出挑战

qaPairs.speakerText: Your coding framework wasn't peer-reviewed. How do you ensure reliability?
qaPairs.speakerTextCn: 你的编码框架未经同行评审，如何保证可靠性？

responses.text: I used inter-coder reliability checks with two independent raters, achieving a Cohen’s Kappa of 0.83, which is considered excellent.
responses.text_cn: 我请两位独立编码员做一致性检验，Kappa值达0.83，属极好水平。

responses.text: I did my best to code consistently—I’m pretty careful.
responses.text_cn: 我尽量保持编码一致，挺仔细的。

responses.text: Kappa = 0.83; protocol documented in Appendix B.
responses.text_cn: Kappa=0.83，流程见附录B。

qaPairs.usageNote: 用具体指标回应方法严谨性质疑

qaPairs.speakerText: You didn’t control for instructor experience. Could that be a confounding variable?
qaPairs.speakerTextCn: 你没控制教师经验，这会不会是干扰变量？

responses.text: You're absolutely right—that’s a key limitation. Future work will stratify by instructor tenure and training level.
responses.text_cn: 您说得对，这是关键局限，后续研究将按教师资历分层。

responses.text: Yeah, that’s kinda a problem, but I didn’t have data on their experience.
responses.text_cn: 确实有问题，但我没教师经验的数据。

responses.text: Limitation noted; instructor experience is a future variable.
responses.text_cn: 已记录为局限，教师经验为未来变量。

qaPairs.usageNote: 承认缺陷并提出改进，展现学术反思能力

subScenes.name: 贡献与应用
subScenes.description: 教授询问研究的实际价值与理论贡献

qaPairs.speakerText: What’s the real-world impact of your findings? Who’ll use this?
qaPairs.speakerTextCn: 你的发现实际影响是什么？谁会用它？

responses.text: University instructional designers can use our AI engagement framework to optimize LMS tools, and policy makers can inform ed-tech funding priorities.
responses.text_cn: 教学设计师可用本框架优化学习平台，政策制定者可据此分配教育科技资金。

responses.text: Teachers could use it to pick better AI tools—pretty practical, right?
responses.text_cn: 老师可以用它选AI工具，挺实用的吧？

responses.text: Impact: LMS optimization + funding guidance.
responses.text_cn: 影响：优化学习平台+指导资金分配。

qaPairs.usageNote: 明确两类受益方：实践者与决策者

qaPairs.speakerText: How does this advance the theoretical literature?
qaPairs.speakerTextCn: 你的研究如何推动理论发展？

responses.text: It bridges the gap between technology adoption theory and student affective engagement, introducing the 'emotional alignment model' as a new construct.
responses.text_cn: 它连接了技术采纳理论与学生情感参与，提出‘情感对齐模型’这一新构念。

responses.text: It shows AI isn't just about efficiency—it affects how students feel.
responses.text_cn: 它说明AI不只是提升效率，还影响学生感受。

responses.text: New construct: Emotional Alignment Model.
responses.text_cn: 新构念：情感对齐模型。

qaPairs.usageNote: 用术语命名新模型，体现理论创新

subScenes.name: 结束致谢
subScenes.description: 答辩结束，委员会致谢与后续说明

qaPairs.speakerText: Thanks for a thoughtful presentation. We'll deliberate and get back to you by Friday.
qaPairs.speakerTextCn: 感谢你精彩的陈述，我们会讨论并在周五前通知结果。

responses.text: Thank you so much for your insightful questions—I really appreciate the time and feedback.
responses.text_cn: 非常感谢您深刻的提问，感激您宝贵的时间与反馈。

responses.text: Thanks! Hope I passed 😅
responses.text_cn: 谢谢！希望我过了 😅

responses.text: Appreciate it. Looking forward to your feedback.
responses.text_cn: 感谢指导，期待您的反馈。

qaPairs.usageNote: 正式回应需表达感谢与尊重，避免轻浮语气

qaPairs.speakerText: You did well. Keep up the good work.

responses.text: Thank you, Professor. I’m committed to refining this work further.
responses.text_cn: 谢谢教授，我会继续完善这项研究。

responses.text: Cool, thanks!
responses.text_cn: 太好了，谢谢！

responses.text: Will do.
responses.text_cn: 我会的。

qaPairs.usageNote: 简短回应可显谦逊，但避免过度随意
